title: wasabia tenuis
intro: Wasabia tenuis, also known as Japanese horseradish, is a type of perennial plant native to Japan and other parts of East Asia. The plant's roots and rhizomes contain compounds with medicinal properties, including isothiocyanates, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Wasabia tenuis include potential relief from pain and inflammation, as well as possible antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Wasabia tenuis is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
